operations.description: Document metadata, containing the version, original size & density, capabilities mask
operations.name: Header

version_variants.description: Header v1.0 layout with 25-byte fixed structure (Major, Minor, Patch, Width, Height, Capabilities).
version_variants.label: v1.0 Flat Header

version_variants.description: Header v1.1 dynamic property-map header (Magic Number 0x048C0001, Minor, Patch, Property Count, Map Tuples).
version_variants.label: v1.1 Property Map Header

operations.name: RootLayout
operations.description: Root element for a document. Other components / layout managers are children in the component tree starting from this Root component.

operations.name: LayoutContent
operations.description: Container for child components. BoxLayout, RowLayout and ColumnLayout expect a LayoutComponentContent as a child, encapsulating the components that need to be laid out.

operations.name: BoxLayout
operations.description:
Box layout implementation.

Child components are laid out independently from one another,
 and painted in their hierarchy order (first children drawnbefore the latter). Horizontal and Vertical positioningare supported.

fields.name: ANIMATION_ID
fields.description: id used to match components, for animation purposes

operations.name: RowLayout
operations.description:
Row layout implementation, positioning components one after the other horizontally.

It supports weight and horizontal/vertical positioning.

fields.name: animationId
fields.description: ID used to match components for animation purposes

operations.name: ColumnLayout
operations.description:
Column layout implementation, positioning components one after the other vertically.

It supports weight and horizontal/vertical positioning.
